name: systolic_blood_pressure
short_description: Systolic blood pressure measured in mmHg at rest
reason_for_inclusion: Continuous response variable for regression modeling; commonly predicted from lifestyle and clinical factors

name: age
short_description: Age of the patient in years
reason_for_inclusion: Strong predictor of blood pressure; essential for adjustment in cardiovascular regression models

name: body_mass_index
short_description: Body mass index calculated as weight in kg divided by height in meters squared
reason_for_inclusion: Obesity is a major risk factor for hypertension; expected positive association with blood pressure

name: smoking_status
short_description: Cigarette smoking history categorized as Never, Former, or Current smoker
reason_for_inclusion: Known modifiable risk factor for hypertension; categorical predictor for regression

name: exercise_frequency
short_description: Self-reported weekly exercise frequency on an ordinal scale
reason_for_inclusion: Physical activity inversely correlates with blood pressure; ordinal predictor for trend analysis

name: ldl_cholesterol
short_description: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol level in mg/dL
reason_for_inclusion: Lipid profile component commonly associated with cardiovascular risk; continuous predictor

name: diabetes_status
short_description: Diabetes diagnosis status: None, Type 1, or Type 2
reason_for_inclusion: Diabetes is a key comorbidity affecting blood pressure regulation; multi-level categorical predictor

name: alcohol_units_per_week
short_description: Average number of standard alcohol units consumed per week
reason_for_inclusion: Alcohol consumption has a J-shaped association with blood pressure; continuous predictor

name: family_history_hypertension
short_description: Whether the patient has a first-degree relative with diagnosed hypertension
reason_for_inclusion: Genetic predisposition is a non-modifiable risk factor; binary categorical predictor

name: sodium_intake_mg
short_description: Estimated daily dietary sodium intake in milligrams
reason_for_inclusion: High sodium intake is causally linked to elevated blood pressure; continuous predictor
